name: Remove Entity Effect
desc: Removes a potion effect from an entity.

implementation.overview: Removes a potion effect from an entity. Complementary to S1DPacketEntityEffect. No module in the examined client sources directly targets this packet.

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S1EPacketRemoveEntityEffect)
modules.purpose: Server sends S1EPacketRemoveEntityEffect to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
